name: io.github.Mibayy/token-savior
description: Structural code intelligence MCP server for AI-assisted development. Navigate and edit codebases by symbol names instead of raw text.

environment_variables.name: WORKSPACE_ROOTS
environment_variables.description: Comma-separated list of absolute paths to project roots to index

environment_variables.name: TOKEN_SAVIOR_CLIENT
environment_variables.description: Optional client identifier (e.g. claude-code, cursor, windsurf)
